response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience (web, backend, embedded) but lacks the core requirements for this role: substantial recent C++ development on Windows, SQL Server/Oracle expertise, and any Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain exposure. C++ experience is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments (2007-2008) and a bachelor thesis project, neither recent nor Windows-focused. Primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) does not align with the role's mandatory skills.
strengths: 15+ years of professional software development across diverse domains
Solid engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development
Strong communication skills demonstrated through talks, workshops, and teaching
concerns: Minimal C++ experience (~6 months in 2007-2008), far below the 5-10 year requirement
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; SQL background appears limited to MySQL/MongoDB
Zero exposure to Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domains

key_factors.factor: No capital markets/fixed income domain knowledge
